text: خَلَقَ‌ السَّمَاوَاتِ‌ وَ الْأَرْضَ‌ بِالْحَقِ‌ تَعَالَى‌ عَمَّا يُشْرِکُونَ‌

en.ahmedali: He created the heavens and the earth with reason. Too glorious and high is He for what they associate with Him.
en.ahmedraza: He created the heavens and the earth with the truth; Supreme is He above their ascribing of partners (to Him).
en.arberry: He created the heavens and the earth in truth; high be He exalted above that they associate With Him!
en.daryabadi: He hath created the heavens and the earth with a purpose. Exalted is He above that which they associate.
en.hilali: He has created the heavens and the earth with truth. High be He Exalted above all they associate as partners with Him.
en.itani: He created the heavens and the earth with justice. He is exalted above the associations they attribute.
en.maududi: He created the heavens and the earth with Truth. Exalted is He above whatever they associate with Allah in His Divinity.
en.mubarakpuri: He has created the heavens and the earth with truth. High is He, Exalted above all that they associate as partners with Him.
en.pickthall: He hath created the heavens and the earth with truth. High be He Exalted above all that they associate (with Him).
en.qarai: He created the heavens and the earth with consummate wisdom. He is above having any partners that they ascribe [to Him].
en.qaribullah: He created the heavens and the earth with truth. Exalted is He above what they associate (with Him)!
en.sahih: He created the heavens and earth in truth. High is He above what they associate with Him.
en.sarwar: He has created the heavens and the earth for a genuine purpose. He is too Exalted to be considered equal to anything else.
en.shakir: He created the heavens and the earth with the truth, highly exalted be He above what they associate (with Him).
en.transliteration: Khalaqa alssamawati waalarda bialhaqqi taAAala AAamma yushrikoona
en.wahiduddin: He created the heavens and the earth for a true purpose. He is exalted above anything they associate with Him.
en.yusufali: He has created the heavens and the earth for just ends: Far is He above having the partners they ascribe to Him!
fa.ansarian: آسمان ها و زمین را به حق آفرید. از آنچه شریک او قرار می دهند، برتر است.
fa.ayati: آسمانها و زمين را به حق بيافريد، از هر چه با او شريك مى‌سازند، برتر است.
fa.bahrampour: آسمان‌ها و زمين را به حق آفريد. او از هر چه با وى شريك مى‌سازند فراتر است
fa.fooladvand: آسمانها و زمين را به حق آفريده است. او فراتر است از آنچه [با وى‌] شريك مى‌گردانند.
fa.ghomshei: خدا آسمانها و زمین را به حق (و برای غرضی محقق و حکمتی بزرگ) آفرید، او از آنچه مشرکان شرک آرند متعالی و منزه است.
fa.khorramdel: آسمانها و زمین را به مقتضای حق (و حکمت) آفریده است (نه بیهوده و به گزاف. خداوند) بالاتر از چیزهائی است که (آنان در تصرّف امور یا پرستش) انباز (خدا) می‌سازند. [[«بِالْحَقِّ»: به مقتضای حق و برابر حکمت.]]
fa.khorramshahi: آسمانها و زمین را به حق آفریده است، فراتر است از آنچه با او شریک می‌سازند
fa.makarem: آسمانها و زمین را بحق آفرید؛ او برتر است از اینکه همتایی برای او قرار می‌دهند!
fa.moezzi: بیافریده است آسمانها و زمین را به حقّ برتر است از آنچه شرک ورزند
fa.mojtabavi: آسمانها و زمين را به حق آفريد برتر است از آنچه [با وى‌] انباز مى‌گيرند.
fa.sadeqi: آسمان‌ها و زمین را به حق (ربانی) آفرید. (او) فراتر است از آنچه (با وی) شریک می‌دارند.
